title: CORVALLIS DAYTIME DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: CORVALLIS DAYTIME DROP-IN CENTER CORVALLIS DAYTIME DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Drop-in center providing a space to socialize, have coffee and snacks, receive mail, phone charging, employment support, information from local health and social organizations, and counseling. Provides assistance with acquiring clothing and shoes; personal hygiene items; medical and dental fees/services; and can assist with transportation needs. Also offers navigation services such as applying for SNAP; completing, obtaining, or replacing official documents like driver's license and birth certificates; access to health providers; housing assistance wait lists; and obtaining a GED. 530 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Homeless and low-income individuals and families; individuals with disabilities Hours: Basic needs: Monday-Friday 9am-noon Social Services support: Monday-Friday noon-2pm by appointment Email (458) 233-5327 - Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 233-5327 Drop-in Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Lincoln Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Certificates/Forms Assistance * Housing Issues Comprehensive Information and Referral Drop In Centers GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction General Clothing Provision Homeless Drop In Centers Homeless Transportation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - LOW-BARRIER COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
